metadata.description:
Embedding service endpoint URL. Supports Azure AI Services (Cognitive Services), Azure AI Foundry, or OpenAI.
Examples:
- Azure AI Services: https://my-ai-service.cognitiveservices.azure.com/
- Azure AI Foundry: https://my-foundry.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/my-project
- OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1
Embedding model deployment name in your Microsoft Foundry project or Azure OpenAI. Common values: text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-3-large, text-embedding-ada-002
Embedding dimensions (optional). Example: 1536 for text-embedding-ada-002, 3072 for text-embedding-3-large. Leave empty of  0 for text-embedding-ada-002
Set to true to use an existing Azure Container Registry instead of creating one
Existing Azure Container Registry name (required when useExistingAcr=true)
Resource group containing the existing ACR (defaults to deployment resource group when empty)
Optional: Microsoft Foundry project resource ID for assigning Entra App role. Format: /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{project}
